message:
fix: restore 2026-only scoring and fix since-filter bug causing missing points (#1522)

* fix: restore 2026-only scoring, drop kubestellar/kubestellar, fix since-filter bug

Three changes:

1. Remove kubestellar/kubestellar from REPOS — only console ecosystem
   repos (console, console-marketplace, console-kb, docs) are scored.

2. Restore YEAR_START / 2026-only scoring (reverts the all-time revert
   from #1521).

3. Fix the `since` query parameter bug: the GitHub REST API filters by
   updated_at when `since` is supplied, not created_at. This caused
   items created in 2026 but not recently updated to be silently dropped,
   producing scores far below the correct totals (e.g. clubanderson
   showing 1.2M instead of ~3.9M, aashu2006 missing entirely from top 10).

   Fix: remove `since` from the API URL so all items are fetched, then
   rely solely on the client-side `created_at >= YEAR_START` filter which
   is accurate. Add an early-exit when the oldest item on a page predates
   YEAR_START to keep pagination efficient.

Fixes #1520

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add leaderboard regression guard to generation workflow

Adds scripts/check-leaderboard-regression.mjs which runs after every
leaderboard generation and compares new scores against the previously
committed snapshot (git show HEAD:public/data/leaderboard.json).

If any contributor with ≥500 pts loses more than 10% of their points,
the script exits non-zero, the workflow fails, and the bad data is NOT
committed. The existing failure handler then opens/updates a GitHub issue.

A LEADERBOARD_FORCE=1 env var (exposed as a workflow_dispatch input)
bypasses the check for intentional scope changes (e.g. switching from
all-time to current-year scoring).

This prevents silent regressions like the since= filter bug (#1520) from
landing in production undetected.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,11 @@ on:
   schedule:
     - cron: '0 2,6,10,14,18,22 * * *'  # Every 4 hours (6x daily)
   workflow_dispatch:       # Manual trigger
+    inputs:
+      force:
+        description: 'Skip regression check (use when intentional scope change lowers scores)'
+        type: boolean
+        default: false
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
@@ -29,6 +34,11 @@ jobs:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.LEADERBOARD_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: node scripts/generate-leaderboard.mjs
 
+      - name: Check for score regressions
+        env:
+          LEADERBOARD_FORCE: ${{ inputs.force == true && '1' || '0' }}
+        run: node scripts/check-leaderboard-regression.mjs
+
       - name: Generate contributor profiles
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.LEADERBOARD_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
